name: ubuntu-claude-code
title: Ubuntu + Chrome + Claude Code (bare, no SideButton runtime)
description: Bare Claude Code agent: keeps the Ubuntu desktop + Chrome + Claude Code so Claude's native browser tools work, but drops the SideButton MCP server, the Chrome extension, and the knowledge-pack registry. A thin fleet job client replaces the SB server on port 9876, implementing the minimal heartbeat/job/status contract the portal expects. Used by the 'SWE Bare' profile to benchmark raw Claude Code against the extension/native variants.
